families.family_label: Letter / Suffix Identity Needs Scope Decision
families.why_it_exists: This row uses a short variant/suffix token that appears to encode printed identity rather than a campaign stamp or special-origin story.
families.why_collectors_care: Some suffixes are collector-meaningful, but not every printed suffix needs a historical origin explanation.
families.how_to_identify: Review set, number, and active identity payload to decide whether this belongs in Variant Origin Index or a separate printed-identity explanation index.
families.grookai_rule: Do not publish a special-origin explanation until the lane is classified as stamp, error, print-run, or other collector-origin family.

families.why_it_exists: This parent row has a non-base variant/modifier, but the origin family is not yet mapped.
families.why_collectors_care: It may still be a legitimate collector lane, but Grookai should not publish origin copy until the family is reviewed.
families.how_to_identify: Review the visible card, variant key, printed identity modifier, and original evidence source.
families.grookai_rule: Unclassified rows stay canonical if already reconciled, but public origin text is blocked.
